title: 80CM Clear Cellophane Wrap Roll, HCSSZ Large Clear Wrapping Floristry Roll Extra Wide 80cm x Long 30m Transparent Gift Wrappings for Flowers Florist Easter Basket Hampers Packing Supplies
features: Size：Large Clear cellophane wrapping Roll, Full 30m roll of 80cm wide, 30 micron. Perfect for wrapping bouquets, plants, gifts, hamper baskets and many other packaging uses.
Easy to use: The 80CM cellophane wrap roll is very easy to work with, you can wrap up all the gifts with one roll, which is very convenient.

Stronger durability: The 30 micron thickness flower gift wrap cellophane roll is durable, provides additional support for baskets, gift, treats, florist, toys and wines, will not rip or tear. It's 100% high transparent, make flowers look more bright. It can also protect the flowers.

Premium quality material: These transparent cellophane wrap for hampers are made from non-toxic, Eco friendly and odourless material. Since it is 100% Food Grade safe, keeping your food fresh and clean.

Multiple uses: This clear cellophane wrap is perfect for any occasion making any gift beautiful. Use it to wrap baskets as cellophane gift bags, large gifts, wine bottles, flower arrangements, arts & craft, cookies, treats, candies, pastries.
Note: This roll of cellophane is folded in half then rolled and shipped in 40CM packaging, it can be expand to 80CM upon unfolding.
